title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
